_authoritative_for: Exact structural/sizing/typography values per doc-kit atom. doc-components.md stays authoritative for narrative/rationale, the Kit-extension rule, and Set A/Set B collision history — this file is what build_plan.py + run-build-plan.figma.js read.

atoms.name: section-title--control-props
atoms.duplicationRule: Duplicate the entire section--control-props block (title + header + N rows) once per [component-name].[block-name] sub-component detected.

atoms.name: control-props--row
atoms.orderNote: One instance per Control Prop — variant axes first, then exposed BOOLEAN/TEXT properties appended after.

atoms.name: anatomy--item
atoms.sizingGotcha: Set layoutSizingVertical = 'HUG' on the instance itself (not just inner text textAutoResize) when overriding multi-line property/flag text, or the instance clips against the next Legend row.
atoms.note: Full generation rules (which properties to show, resolution order) stay authoritative in anatomy-rules.md — not computed by build_plan.py in v1.

deprecatedNote: Do not instance in new runs; do not clean up orphaned existing instances.

discovery.fallback: search rest of file for a legacy pre-convention layout
discovery.missingAtomRule: Ask the user before publishing — never automatically. Create ❖ volundr-components-doc (+ empty --- divider page above it) only after confirmation, if the file has neither.
discovery.collisionRule: If two components share an atom name with different specs, stop and ask which is canonical before instancing either.
